/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fno-operator-names -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -shared -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--enable-new-dtags   -o harmonicplugin.so CMakeFiles/harmonicplugin.dir/harmonicplugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/harmonicplugin.dir/harmonicplugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/harmonicplugin.dir/harmonicview.cpp.o CMakeFiles/harmonicplugin.dir/harmonicconfigpage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/harmonicplugin.dir/harmonicchatwidget.cpp.o   -L/home/lengau/Work/Code/harmonic/plugin/../target/release  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lengau/Work/Code/harmonic/plugin/../target/release: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF6TextEditor.so.6.24.0 -lharmonic /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF6Parts.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF6XmlGui.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF6ConfigWidgets.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF6SyntaxHighlighting.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF6Completion.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF6ColorScheme.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF6ConfigGui.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF6GuiAddons.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF6WidgetsAddons.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF6KIOCore.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF6I18n.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF6ConfigCore.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF6CoreAddons.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Xml.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6DBus.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
